changes.summary: In-app changelog: a clickable version pill opens an About dialog showing what's new per version, with a roadmap
Update the app in one click — approve a pending release or force an update from the About dialog
Device controls (play, pause, next, previous) now show a loading spinner and a success or error toast
Redesigned About dialog: branded header, timeline changelog and roadmap
Update API: report, approve and force over-the-air updates
Single source of truth for the version, exposed at /version and /changelog
GitOps deployment on Kubernetes (Argo CD) with Keel auto-updates
Reliable aladhan.home access at home: local and IPv6 DNS now both go through Pi-hole
City search now works by name alone, instead of only matching when you typed the exact country code
Prayer engine aligned with the canonical algorithm (Maghrib, high-latitude fallback, method-aware midnight)
Multi-backend playback: Sonos, Freebox (Player + AirMedia), Bluetooth, and the host machine
"Mihrab at Dawn" UI redesign, fully responsive, with per-device settings
Year calendar with branded PDF export and authentic Arabic Hijri dates
Six languages (EN, FR, DE, ES, NL, AR) with right-to-left support
Browser geolocation with reverse-geocoding to a city name
Scheduler is now a true singleton with datetime-based scheduling (fixes DST and post-reboot day errors)
Cities database slimmed from 1.5 GB to 12 MB
First release: prayer times computed from scratch as a FastAPI service
Sonos speaker discovery and adhan playback
React frontend with prayer times and a printable calendar
Dockerised multi-arch image (amd64 + arm64) for the Raspberry Pi

roadmap.title: Harden local .home access and ad-filtering across every device
